page.connectionDescription: Connect your Google account to SalesDesk and manage calendar integration.
page.syncDescription: Monitor sync scope and permissions from this screen.
page.logsDescription: Google integration logs will be listed on this page.
page.authInformationDescription: Manage tenant-level Google OAuth settings from this page.

connection.connectedError: Google connection could not be completed.
connection.connectError: Google authorize URL could not be fetched.
connection.disconnectError: Google connection could not be removed.
connection.testEventError: Test event could not be created.
connection.oauthNotConfiguredWarning: Google OAuth is not configured. Your admin must configure it on 'Google Auth Information'.

authInformation.enableDescription: If disabled, users cannot connect their Google accounts.
authInformation.saveError: Google OAuth settings could not be saved.
authInformation.loadError: Google OAuth settings could not be loaded.
authInformation.setupGuideDescription: Get Client ID and Client Secret from Google Cloud Console.
authInformation.setupStep1: Open Google Cloud Console and select the correct project.
authInformation.setupStep2: Complete app details on APIs & Services > OAuth consent screen.
authInformation.setupStep3: Create a Web application from APIs & Services > Credentials > Create credentials > OAuth client ID.
authInformation.setupStep4: Add the callback URL below into Authorized redirect URIs and save.
authInformation.setupStep5: Copy generated Client ID and Client Secret and save them on this page.
authInformation.setupStep6: If IsEnabled is off, users cannot connect with Google.
authInformation.apiEnableHint: For mail and calendar operations, both Calendar API and Gmail API must be enabled in the same Google project.

sync.flowMeeting: Meeting activities are synchronized to Google Calendar.
sync.flowCall: Call activities are synchronized to Google Calendar.
sync.flowPlaceholder: Detailed sync settings will be available in the next release.

mailDialog.title: Send Google Mail
mailDialog.missingCustomer: No customer is linked to this record. Customer is required to send mail.
mailDialog.autoRecipientHint: If empty, contact/customer email will be used automatically
mailDialog.pdfCardDescription: Choose a template for this document type. The generated PDF is added directly as an attachment.
mailDialog.pdfTemplateRequired: Please select a PDF template first.
mailDialog.pdfAttached: PDF generated and added to attachments.
mailDialog.pdfTemplatesLoadFailed: PDF templates could not be loaded.
mailDialog.noPdfTemplates: No active PDF template found for this document type.
mailDialog.invalidRecipients: Invalid email addresses must be fixed before sending.

policies.validation: Sending is blocked if any address is invalid.
policies.activity: A SalesDesk activity is created after a successful send.
policies.logging: A send log is stored in the system.

generic.subject: {{module}} {{recordNo}} — information
generic.body:
Hello,

We would like to inform you about the {{module}} record for customer {{customer}}.

  • Document: {{recordNo}}
  • Revision: {{revisionNo}}
  • Customer code: {{customerCode}}
  • Total: {{total}}
  • Valid until: {{validUntil}}

Best regards.

followUp.subject: {{module}} {{recordNo}} — follow-up
followUp.body:
Hello,

Following up on the {{module}} record for {{customer}} / {{contact}}.

{{contextTitle}}

Please reply when convenient.

reminder.subject: {{module}} {{recordNo}} — reminder
reminder.body:
Hello,

This is a reminder regarding the {{module}} record for {{customer}}.

Document: {{recordNo}}
Total: {{total}}
Valid until: {{validUntil}}

Thank you.

mailDialog.activityLogEnabled: A SalesDesk activity and log are automatically created after successful sending.

logs.detailsDescription: Detailed information about the selected Google integration log entry.
